tags.name: `mc-multi-choice-fieldset`
tags.description:
Events:

  * `change` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fired when any item in the group is checked/unckecked.

  * `input` {`CustomEvent<string | boolean | unknown[] | null>`} - 

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - One or more HTMLelements to display in the group.

  * ``legend`` {} - The legend HTML to use for the fieldset.

  * ``hint`` {} - The hint HTML to use for the fieldset.

  * ``errormessage`` {} - The errormessage HTML to use for the fieldset.

Attributes:

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - 

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the fieldset.

  * `legend` {`string`} - Fieldset legend has to be passed as a property. Legend is required.

  * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot.
Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text.

  * `errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error message will be shown only if invalid attribute is set to `true`.
Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot.
Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text.

  * `invalid` {`boolean`} - If `true`, puts the fieldset into the `invalid` state.
`Errormessage` can be displayed if provided.

  * `hiddenlegend` {`boolean`} - Hides the fieldset legend and uses the `legend` property text as an `aria-label` for the hidden legend.

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - Orientation of the fieldset.

  * `autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - By default, on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), the component's `orientation` is switched to vertical,
regardless of the set orientation. However, setting `disabledautolayout` to `true`
prevents this and preserves the current `orientation` setting.

  * `disabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `name` {`string`} - 

  * `value` {`Value | undefined`} - Selected element of the fieldset.

  * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - 

  * `type` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `required` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

Properties:

  * `groupFirstUpdated` {`boolean`} - 

  * `inputsSlot` {`HTMLSlotElement | null | undefined`} - 

  * `inputs` {`HTMLInputElement[] | undefined`} - 

  * `fieldset` {`HTMLFieldSetElement | null | undefined`} - 

  * `hintElement` - 

  * `errorElement` - 

  * `readonly` {`boolean`} - 

  * `inputsSlotIsReady` - 

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the fieldset.

  * `legend` {`string`} - Fieldset legend has to be passed as a property. Legend is required.

  * `hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot.
Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text.

  * `errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error message will be shown only if invalid attribute is set to `true`.
Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot.
Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text.

  * `invalid` {`boolean`} - If `true`, puts the fieldset into the `invalid` state.
`Errormessage` can be displayed if provided.

  * `hiddenlegend` {`boolean`} - Hides the fieldset legend and uses the `legend` property text as an `aria-label` for the hidden legend.

  * `change` - Change on the button

  * `orientation` {`Orientation`} - Orientation of the fieldset.

  * `autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - By default, on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), the component's `orientation` is switched to vertical,
regardless of the set orientation. However, setting `disabledautolayout` to `true`
prevents this and preserves the current `orientation` setting.

  * `disabled` {`boolean`} - 

  * `_onMouseDown` - 

  * `name` {`string`} - 

  * `value` {`Value | undefined`} - Selected element of the fieldset.

  * `checked` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `files` {`FileList | undefined`} - 

  * `type` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `required` {`boolean | undefined`} - 

  * `hiddenInput` {`HTMLInputElement | undefined`} - 

  * `controlType` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `isCheckable` {`boolean`} - 

  * `inputType` {`string`} -

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the fieldset.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: legend
attributes.description:
`legend` {`string`} - Fieldset legend has to be passed as a property. Legend is required.

Property: legend

Default: Legend

attributes.name: hint
attributes.description:
`hint` {`string | undefined`} - Hint can be passed as simple argument like: `hint="hint text"` or as a named slot.
Use argument style for passing short hints, use named slot when you want to pass hint with HTML text.

Property: hint

attributes.name: errormessage
attributes.description:
`errormessage` {`string | undefined`} - Error message will be shown only if invalid attribute is set to `true`.
Error message can be passed as simple argument like: `errormessage="error"` or as a named slot.
Use argument style for passing short messages, use named slot when you want to pass error message with HTML text.

Property: errormessage

attributes.name: invalid
attributes.description:
`invalid` {`boolean`} - If `true`, puts the fieldset into the `invalid` state.
`Errormessage` can be displayed if provided.

Property: invalid

Default: false

attributes.name: hiddenlegend
attributes.description:
`hiddenlegend` {`boolean`} - Hides the fieldset legend and uses the `legend` property text as an `aria-label` for the hidden legend.

Property: hiddenlegend

Default: false

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description:
`orientation` {`Orientation`} - Orientation of the fieldset.

Property: orientation

Default: vertical

attributes.name: autolayoutdisabled
attributes.description:
`autolayoutdisabled` {`boolean`} - By default, on `small` screens (max-width: 640px), the component's `orientation` is switched to vertical,
regardless of the set orientation. However, setting `disabledautolayout` to `true`
prevents this and preserves the current `orientation` setting.

Property: autolayoutdisabled

Default: false

attributes.name: value
attributes.description:
`value` {`Value | undefined`} - Selected element of the fieldset.

Property: value

attributes.name: onchange
attributes.description: `change` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Fired when any item in the group is checked/unckecked.
